summary: Iteration 26 - ROUND_TRANSITION Three-Tier State Detection Testing COMPLETE. All 26 backend tests PASSED (10 round_transition + 5 debounce + 11 API tests). The fix prevents observer from incorrectly interpreting normal turn/round changes as end-of-match.
passed_tests: UNIT: test_round_transition_does_not_end_session - ROUND_TRANSITION during IN_GAME does NOT end session
UNIT: test_round_transition_resets_exit_debounce - ROUND_TRANSITION resets exit poll counter
UNIT: test_real_match_finish_triggers_end - FINISHED state with strong markers triggers session end
UNIT: test_abort_sustained_idle_triggers_end - Sustained IDLE triggers session end with 'aborted'
UNIT: test_multiple_round_transitions_no_exit - Multiple turn changes do not exit
UNIT: test_round_transition_then_real_match_end - Turn change followed by real end works
UNIT: test_round_transition_interleaved_with_idle - Alternating IDLE/ROUND_TRANSITION prevents false exit
UNIT: test_round_transition_outside_in_game_is_idle - ROUND_TRANSITION outside IN_GAME treated as IDLE
UNIT: test_game_start_still_immediate - Entering IN_GAME is immediate (no debounce)
UNIT: test_finished_to_idle_post_finish_check - FINISHED → IDLE triggers post_finish_check callback
REGRESSION: test_debounce_config - Debounce constants valid (3 polls × 2s = 6s)
REGRESSION: test_turn_change_does_not_exit_in_game - Brief flicker recovered
REGRESSION: test_real_abort_triggers_after_debounce - Sustained IDLE triggers abort
REGRESSION: test_real_finish_triggers_after_debounce - Sustained FINISHED triggers finish
REGRESSION: test_mixed_flicker_does_not_exit - Alternating pattern does not exit
API: ROUND_TRANSITION enum value is 'round_transition'
API: All 7 ObserverState enum values exist (closed, idle, in_game, round_transition, finished, unknown, error)
API: GET /api/kiosk/BOARD-1/observer-status returns 200
API: observer-status has 'state' field with valid value
API: observer-status has all required fields
API: simulate-game-start requires admin auth (returns 401/403 without token)
API: simulate-game-start works with admin token
API: simulate-game-end works with admin token
API: simulate-game-abort works with admin token
API: Full lifecycle (lock → unlock → start → end) works correctly
API: Full lifecycle (lock → unlock → start → abort) works correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 26 verified the ROUND_TRANSITION three-tier state detection fix. KEY: Observer now has 7 states including ROUND_TRANSITION. The _detect_state method uses three tiers: Tier 1 (in_game markers) → IN_GAME, Tier 2 (strong button text like Rematch/Share) → FINISHED, Tier 3 (generic result CSS classes only) → ROUND_TRANSITION, Tier 4 (nothing) → IDLE. The _observe_loop treats ROUND_TRANSITION as 'still in game' and resets exit_polls counter. This prevents normal turn/round changes from triggering premature session end. Only strong match-end markers (Rematch, Share, New Game buttons) trigger FINISHED and session end.

three_tier_detection.tier_1: IN_GAME - Active match markers (scoreboard, dart-input, throw, scoring)
three_tier_detection.tier_2: FINISHED - Strong end markers (Rematch/Share/NewGame button TEXT)
three_tier_detection.tier_3: ROUND_TRANSITION - Generic result/winner/finished CSS classes (turn/round change)

round_transition_handling.behavior: ROUND_TRANSITION detected while stable=IN_GAME resets exit_polls to 0
round_transition_handling.rationale: Turn/round changes show generic result classes but match is still active

bug_fix_summary.problem: Observer incorrectly interpreted normal turn/round changes as end-of-match because generic result CSS classes were mapped directly to FINISHED state
bug_fix_summary.root_cause: Autodarts reuses CSS classes like [class*='result'], [class*='winner'], [class*='finished'] during both turn transitions AND actual match end
bug_fix_summary.fix: Three-tier detection: generic CSS classes now map to ROUND_TRANSITION (not FINISHED). Only strong button text markers (Rematch, Share, New Game) map to FINISHED. ROUND_TRANSITION resets exit debounce counter instead of counting toward session end.
bug_fix_summary.verification: All 10 unit tests pass proving ROUND_TRANSITION does NOT end session, only FINISHED does
